info.name: DantaPlus - Endpoints from patient.pdf + supplier.pdf only
info.description: Only the endpoints that were added or modified as a direct result of the feedback points in these two files. Each folder is labeled with the original feedback point number. Does not include unrelated general changes (e.g. PATCH->POST cleanup on shipping-zones or users) that aren't tied to this specific feedback.

request.description: Patient portal login. Patients are created by the clinic and log in with name + phone only.
Returns id and name for base services plus services created by the patient's clinic.

response.name: Available slots with availability flags

formdata.description: Required. Must be a base service or a service created by the patient's clinic.
Required. Must be an Active branch in the patient clinic.

request.description: From feedback: notification icon is missing from the header

item.name: 2) Products - view broken, duplicate submit, multiple images

request.description: From feedback: view button not working
From two feedback points: (1) clicking Add twice creates the product twice (2) need more than one image

item.name: 3) Inventories - table, popup, and cards incorrect

request.description: From feedback: the cards at the top are not the ones that should be there
From feedback: table is not correct, missing data
From feedback: popup should match the design with the same data
From feedback: a part of the conversation/communication system is missing (compared to clinic.php)
From feedback: view button not working (table position is frontend-only)
Actual invoice download endpoint (returns PDF, not JSON)

item.name: 6) Accounts - missing period filter + incomplete Profit & Loss

request.description: From feedback: day/week/year filter is missing on the dashboard page
From feedback: Profit & Loss page is not correct and is missing several things
From feedback: profile is incomplete, missing data
